steps.title: Use exponential form
steps.content:
Each time $x$ increases by $1$, $y$ is multiplied by $3$. That means the relationship has the form
$$
y=a(3)^x
$$

steps.title: Use the starting value
steps.content: When $x=0$, $y=180$. $$ 180=a(3)^0=a $$ So the equation is $y=180(3)^x$. The answer is B.
